siteDescription: Surveys that feel like conversations, not homework. Run polls, conversational surveys, and reward participation, inside Discord and on the web.

redirectPage.auto: You'll be redirected automatically in a moment.

footer.brandDescription: The best survey bot for Discord communities. Run polls, collect more feedback in conversations, reward participants with XP and roles.

hero.title: GET TO KNOW YOUR
hero.subtitle: with surveys that feel like conversations, not homework.

features.title: PEOPLE SHARE MORE WHEN THEY ENJOY THE CONVERSATION.
features.subtitle: A wall of form fields feels like homework. Subo polls, surveys and quizzes are friendly conversations which people actually want to join.

list.title: ASK IN CONVERSATION
list.body: Subo asks one question at a time, like a chat. Members open up, and you learn things a form wall never surfaces.

list.title: POLLS THAT DO MORE
list.body: A single question that can score answers, grade a quiz, or run a prediction contest, then reward the winners automatically.

list.title: PARTICIPATION THAT PAYS OFF
list.body: Hand out XP, roles, and achievements, tuned to how members actually answer. Recognition that brings people back.

testimonialsSubTitle: ❤️ by mods, community managers, creators, entrepreneurs, product, UX and insights teams.

testimonialsList.text: I love Subo! Best survey bot ever! So easy and simple to use! Any issues are dealt with swiftly by an awesome customer support person!
testimonialsList.author: obimage

testimonialsList.text: Simple and so great to use
testimonialsList.author: Judge Jaxon

testimonialsList.text: Thank you for having the best poll bot out there, seriously. I have tried a lot of them. This is by far the best.
testimonialsList.author: YeahImShady

testimonialsList.text: This app is perfect. And the support they provide is also top notch. Highly recommended if you're doing any type of poll, survey, or voting
testimonialsList.author: .dutty

testimonialsList.text: This is the best polling solution on Discord currently. The setup is intuitive and not once caused me any issues. Having managed a server of over a thousand participants and needing something specific for anonymous voting with anonymous results, this was the perfect bot where no other poll solution bots did the job. It can listen to Integrations roles (something larger bots such as carl & MEE6 cannot do), you can set specific role restrictions, and even multiple choice surveys. Alongside that, its support team is top notch and attentive to its userbase's questions and concerns.
testimonialsList.author: DJTiki 🌴

testimonialsList.text: Your app has really ticked all the boxes for us and I've been impressed with the level of configuration options, it's the most full featured one that I've come across so, can't fault it!
testimonialsList.author: schmoopy101

testimonialsList.text: I am a server builder. i make them for friends that need them for work/ events/ community out reach to help their cause. This bot is amazingly well created! I use it a lot in servers! It is so easy to maneuver and use. It is great for people who are not used to bots/ discord. Makes it easy to learn how to use! I just recently discovered it a few weeks back, and have deleted all other survey bots and replaced it with this one haha.
testimonialsList.author: risingblossom92

testimonialsList.text: Used this bot with over 400 users to make a trivia month every day of last month and worked out great! I was making surveys with pictures, that had multiple options and then feeding the excel file I got from the bot at the end of the day to compile together a months worth of excel files, then made a leaderboard from that information!
testimonialsList.author: Bezarius

testimonialsList.text: Subo has been a joy to use since I have started my premium subscription. Recurring polls and other polls can run on a scheduled time frame that I need and the developers are actively working on the project. The developers frequently and quickly respond to tickets and helped me when there was a bug in the software due to the length of polls that I was running. Subo is a great alternative to Google Forms or Microsoft Forms for those who want their polls and surveys directly integrated as well as some ai analysis for longer surveys to identify what people want most in written responses.
testimonialsList.author: ryangrg422

testimonialsList.text: thanks for your brilliant app! I use it every week
testimonialsList.author: jpob

ctaTitle: START A CONVERSATION WITH YOUR COMMUNITY.
ctaSubtitle: No credit card. No setup hassle. Just jump in and play around with few limitations. Do more with paid plans when you're ready.
successDescription: Please contact the Team by email or on our Discord server with your Discord Server ID or name and we'll upgrade your server ASAP.

successSteps.title: Add Subo to Your Server
successSteps.desc: If you haven't already, invite Subo to your Discord server and accept the suggested permissions.

successSteps.title: Send your Server details to the Subo Team
successSteps.desc: Notify the Subo Team with your Discord Server ID or name. You can contact the Support Team by email or on our Discord server.

successSteps.title: Join Our Support Server
successSteps.desc: While you wait, join our support community to see examples, stay updated with new features or ask questions. Check our Tutorials to get started and make the most out of Subo.

successSteps.title: Verify that your Subscription is Active
successSteps.desc: Once you've sent your server details, the Subo Team will upgrade your server as soon as they can and will confirm your upgrade. Be patient, as it requires some manual verification. You can verify your upgrade was activated by using the /premium command in your Discord server.

faqList.question: Why do I need to choose between Stripe and Discord?
faqList.answer: We support Discord's native App Store, which is more convenient for many users, but the Discord App Store doesn't offer multiple server and annual subscriptions, so we also created a Stripe solution for that.

faqList.question: Why do I have to wait for my premium subscription to become active?
faqList.answer: Stripe collects your email address to create an account for you, but we can't connect this email address with your Discord server. This means we need to manually verify your account before activating your premium subscription. We intend to automate this process in the future, but for now, we appreciate your patience.

faqList.question: How do I find my server ID?
faqList.answer: You can find your server ID by right-clicking on your server name in Discord and selecting 'Copy Server ID'. If you don't see this option, you may need to enable Developer Mode in your Discord settings (which we recommend anyway).

faqList.question: How do I change or cancel a subscription?
faqList.answer: You can manage your subscription at any time via the Stripe Billing Portal or Discord Store, depending on how you upgraded. To access the Stripe Billing Portal, you will need to log in with the email address you used to pay for the upgrade. See links in footer.

faqList.question: What happens if I cancel my premium subscription?
faqList.answer: Once the end of your subscription period (month, year) comes, your bot will be switched back to the free version of Subo. You will still be able to use Subo, but with the limitations of the free tier.  If you have a project live, it may stop if you reach your maximum allowance for respondents or responses. If you have too many projects on your account, you may have to delete some before you are allowed to create new ones.

cardFeatures: Your own bot name, avatar & bio

tableData:
Answers
Answer = Respondent x Question (e.g. 60 respondents answering 5 questions = 300 answers)

Total Projects
Total projects stored. Delete old projects to stay in a smaller tier.

Active Projects
Polls and surveys open or scheduled at the same time

Invitation / Thank You Customization
Customize invitations (footer, thumbnail, color), results and thank you messages

New response Notifications
New responses posted in a private channel with optional ping

Delete some responses
Delete some or all responses from a project
Advanced Script Builder: min/max open text length & numeric values

Skip Logic & Conditional Rewards
Branch questions and trigger XP, roles, or achievements based on answers

Action Block styling
Custom images and colors on mid-survey reward blocks

Advanced Expression Editor
Complex conditional logic for skip rules and rewards
Advanced Script Builder: customize 'Continue' button in content blocks

AI credits
Credits are needed to generate survey drafts with /draft and to summarize open-ended responses

✗
1 role server-wise for ever answering any project
Role rewards based on monthly XP

XP system
including leaderboard and up to 5 role rewards based on overall XP

surveyConvos.pageDescription: Subo turns surveys into friendly Discord conversations. Members answer questions one-on-one with the bot, no boring forms, higher completion rates, richer answers.
surveyConvos.heroSubtitle: Not a form. Not just a poll. A friendly one-on-one chat where your members actually want to respond.
whatBody: A survey convo is a private message conversation between your community member and Subo, the bot, right inside your Discord server or on the web.

Instead of sending members to a cold, generic form, Subo invites them to a chat. Questions appear one at a time, in a friendly message format. It feels like talking to someone, not filling out paperwork.
The result? Higher completion rates, richer answers, and members who actually enjoy the experience.

formsVsConvosItems.forms: No way to add context or instructions between questions
formsVsConvosItems.convos: Content blocks add intros, warnings, GIFs, or pauses anywhere in the flow
Members stay in Discord or use the web link

howSteps.title: You build the survey
howSteps.desc: Create a survey using the /survey command, or use /draft to let Subo's AI generate one based on your objectives. You can also build and manage surveys from the Subo web app.

howSteps.title: Subo invites your members
howSteps.desc: Subo posts an invite in your Discord server. Members click the invite and answer questions privately, right inside Discord, or via a web link.

howSteps.title: You get results instantly
howSteps.desc: View aggregated results, individual responses, and let Subo's AI summarize open-ended answers so you always know what your community thinks.

surveyConvos.questionTypesSubtitle: 4 question types for every kind of answer, content blocks for messages and pauses, action blocks that reward participation, and calculated fields that turn answers into scores.

questionTypesList.name: Single Choice
questionTypesList.desc: Pick one from multiple options (yes/no included)

questionTypesList.name: Content Block
questionTypesList.desc: Message, intro, GIF, or pause, no answer needed

questionTypesList.name: Action Block
questionTypesList.desc: Reward XP, roles, or achievements, conditionally on answers

questionTypesList.name: Calculated Field
questionTypesList.desc: Compute a score, segment, or value from earlier answers

surveyConvos.webTitle: ON DISCORD AND ON THE WEB
surveyConvos.webDesc: Survey convos work natively inside Discord, but Subo also supports a web-based survey experience. Admins choose whether a survey runs in Discord or on the web, and whether it's open to anyone or restricted to community members. Either way, you manage surveys, view results, and analyze data from the Subo web admin.
benefitsList: 👋 Greets members by name and rewards them as they go, not just at the finish line
📱 Works on mobile without any friction
🤫 Optional anonymous mode for honest, unfiltered feedback
🔀 Skip logic: skip irrelevant questions, and trigger rewards based on answers
📢 Content blocks: add an intro, key context, GIF, or mid-survey pause without asking a question
⏱️ Scheduled and recurring surveys run automatically
🏆 XP, roles, and achievements drive higher participation

about.pageTitle: About Subo | The Discord Survey Bot
about.pageDescription: Learn about Subo, the Discord survey and poll bot trusted by 15,000+ communities to collect feedback and engage members.
about.heroSubtitle: SU-BO. Survey Bot. Built for communities that want real answers.
storyBody: Subo was started in 2021 by a small team of pros 🤓 with decades of experience building survey platforms used by millions of global users, and by the world's top brands and researchers. We'd seen from the inside how survey tools were built: optimized for enterprise sales cycles, not for the people actually taking them. The experience was consistently bad, and we wanted to do something about it.

So we built Subo. Bootstrapped, self-funded, and fiercely independent, entirely focused on making feedback feel like a conversation rather than a chore. Discord was the perfect place to start: a platform where communities were already talking, and where the tools for listening were badly missing.

Since launch, Subo has grown to serve over 15,000 Discord servers, from gaming guilds to creator communities, DAOs, sports clubs, brand communities, and educational groups. We're a small team, and we intend to stay that way.

stats.label: Block types (4 question types, content, action, calculated)

differentiators.title: Conversational by design
differentiators.desc: Questions arrive as private messages, one at a time, in a chat format. Content blocks let you add intros, context, or pauses anywhere in the flow. Not a form page. A real conversation.

differentiators.title: AI-powered analysis
differentiators.desc: Subo uses AI to draft survey questions for you and to summarize open-ended responses. What used to take hours now takes seconds.

differentiators.title: Gamification built in
differentiators.desc: Members earn XP, level up, and unlock roles, XP, or achievements based on how they answer, not just whether they finish.

differentiators.title: Discord AND the web
differentiators.desc: Surveys work inside Discord and on the web. Members without Discord can participate too. You manage everything from the Subo web admin.

differentiators.title: Anonymous mode
differentiators.desc: When sensitive topics require honest answers, enable anonymous mode. Three options: full anonymity, identified, or partial. You choose the right level.

differentiators.title: Advanced targeting
differentiators.desc: Send surveys to specific roles, channels, or individuals. Use skip logic to branch questions based on prior answers. Built for precision.

about.missionBody: We believe every community deserves to be heard, and that the tools for listening should be as engaging as the communities themselves. Too often, an admin spends hours crafting a survey, hits send, and gets a handful of responses. Not because members don't care, but because a wall of form fields feels like homework. Subo closes the gap between what a survey has always felt like and what a real conversation feels like.

You will still be able to use Subo, but with the limitations of the free tier.  If you have a project live, it may stop if you reach your maximum allowance for respondents or responses. If you have too many projects on your account, you may have to delete some before you are allowed to create new ones.

faqs.question: How do I change or cancel a subscription?
faqs.answer: You can manage your subscription at any time via the Stripe Billing Portal. To access it, log in with the email address you used to upgrade.

useCasesGetThingsDone.pageTitle: Discord Applications, Sign-ups & Requests, Without the Form | Subo
useCasesGetThingsDone.pageDescription: Run applications, registrations, RSVPs, orders, and ticket intake inside Discord as a friendly conversation. Skip logic, role targeting, scheduling, and auto-roles on completion.
useCasesGetThingsDone.heroTitle: EVERYTHING YOU USED TO TRAP IN A FORM
useCasesGetThingsDone.heroSubtitle: Applications, sign-ups, orders and requests, as a friendly conversation instead of a wall of fields.

sections.label: WHY A CONVERSATION WINS
sections.title: More people finish what they start
sections.sub: A long form scares people off. Subo asks one step at a time, right where your members already are.

cards.title: One step at a time
cards.desc: Questions arrive like a chat, so a 20-field application feels like a quick exchange. See survey convos →

cards.title: No link-out
cards.desc: It runs inside Discord, or on the web when you need it. No redirect to a form nobody trusts.

cards.title: Branch on answers
cards.desc: Skip logic routes each person to the questions that actually apply to them. Shorter, smarter intake.

cards.title: Right level of privacy
cards.desc: Keep submissions identified for follow-up, or anonymous when that fits the request.

sections.label: RUN IT END TO END
sections.title: From submission to action
sections.sub: Subo does more than collect. It can route, schedule, and act on what comes in.

cards.title: Scheduled open & close
cards.desc: Open registrations on a date and close them on a deadline, automatically.

cards.title: Choose who can submit
cards.desc: Restrict to specific roles, your whole server, or open it to anyone with the link.

cards.title: Intros & confirmations
cards.desc: Content blocks add a welcome, rules to acknowledge, or a confirmation message anywhere in the flow.

cards.title: Auto-roles on completion
cards.desc: Action blocks can assign a role the moment someone finishes, like an onboarding or applicant role.

useCasesEngagement.pageTitle: Discord Engagement: Polls, Quizzes & Prediction Contests | Subo
useCasesEngagement.pageDescription: Keep your Discord community coming back with polls, auto-graded quizzes, prediction contests, XP, leaderboards, and role rewards. Participation that members look forward to.
useCasesEngagement.heroSubtitle: Polls, quizzes and prediction contests that turn taking part into something members look forward to.

sections.label: PLAY
sections.title: More than a quick vote
sections.sub: Native Discord polls just count votes. Subo turns a question into a game.

cards.title: Polls that do more
cards.desc: Score answers, mark the right ones, and reward the winners automatically. See Discord polls →

cards.title: Auto-graded quizzes
cards.desc: Mark correct answers and let Subo score every player instantly. Trivia nights run themselves.

cards.title: Prediction contests
cards.desc: Members predict outcomes, Subo scores them when results land. Perfect for games, matches, and events.

cards.title: Just for fun
cards.desc: Snap polls, hot takes, and meme brackets that give your community a reason to show up today.

sections.label: REWARD
sections.title: Make participation worth something
sections.sub: Recognition is what brings members back. Subo hands it out automatically.

cards.title: XP rewards
cards.desc: Every completed project earns XP. Available on all plans, even free.

cards.title: Monthly leaderboard
cards.desc: An automatic monthly XP leaderboard posted in Discord, ranking your most engaged members.

cards.title: Role rewards
cards.desc: Grant or remove Discord roles based on participation, scores, or XP thresholds.

cards.title: Custom XP name
cards.desc: Rename XP to match your brand: "Stars", "Coins", "Rep". Make it feel like yours.

useCasesResearch.pageTitle: Discord Community Research: Surveys That Get Honest Answers | Subo
useCasesResearch.pageDescription: Learn who your Discord members are and what they want. Subo runs conversational surveys with anonymity modes, role targeting, live charts, and AI summaries of open-text answers.
useCasesResearch.heroTitle: KNOW WHO YOUR COMMUNITY REALLY IS
useCasesResearch.heroSubtitle: Learn who your members are, what they want, and how they feel, with surveys people actually finish.

sections.label: HONEST ANSWERS
sections.title: Better questions get better data
sections.sub: A form wall makes people rush or bail. Subo asks like a person, so the answers are more complete and more honest.

cards.title: Conversations, not forms
cards.desc: One question at a time, like a chat. Higher completion and more thoughtful answers. See survey convos →

cards.title: Three anonymity modes
cards.desc: Identified, More Anonymous, or Fully Anonymous. Set the level of trust per survey and get candid feedback on sensitive topics.

cards.title: Role targeting
cards.desc: Survey the right segment, your paying members, your mods, your lurkers, separately, so you compare like with like.

cards.title: Skip logic, cleaner data
cards.desc: Everyone sees only relevant questions. No "N/A" noise polluting your results.

sections.label: FROM ANSWERS TO INSIGHT
sections.title: Turn hundreds of responses into clear decisions
sections.sub: From live charts to AI-synthesized summaries, your data does the heavy lifting.

cards.title: Live results dashboard
cards.desc: Aggregated responses as they arrive: charts for closed questions, response lists for open text.

cards.title: AI open-text summaries
cards.desc: Subo reads every open answer and writes a concise synthesis. The gist of 500 responses in seconds.

cards.title: CSV export
cards.desc: Take the full dataset into Excel, Google Sheets, or your own tooling for deeper analysis.

cards.title: Share findings
cards.desc: Post a results summary back into Discord to close the feedback loop with your community.

customSurveyBot.pageTitle: Custom Survey Bot - Your Brand, Your Bot
customSurveyBot.pageDescription: Everything you like about Subo, but with your own branding

hero.title: ___, YOUR SURVEY BOT
hero.subtitle: Everything you like about Subo, but with your own branding

comparison.title: THE BEST OF SUBO WITH YOUR OWN BRANDING
comparison.subtitle: You like Subo features, hosting and support but want your own Survey Bot, totally personalized for your server? A Custom Survey bot is perfect for you!

cards.title: THE BEST OF SUBO
items: All Subo features, hosting and support
All enhancements: when Subo gets better, so does your custom bot
Limits and AI credits at the VIP tier, the highest tier available

steps.title: Subscribe
steps.description: Visit our subscriptions page and choose the Yearly 'Custom Bot' option.

steps.title: Create your own app
steps.description: Create your own app in the Discord App portal.

steps.title: Set up your custom bot in the web app
steps.description: Log into the Subo Web App, go to Settings, and enter your custom app's name and token. Hit Publish, and your branded bot will be live in minutes.

steps.title: Enjoy!
steps.description: Enjoy your new Custom Survey Bot. For more information, check our tutorial.

items.question: What is the difference between the normal Subo bots and the Custom Survey Bot?
items.answer: The Subo bot is the default survey bot that you get when you invite Subo. It has some customization options, but it has a fixed app avatar, description, and name. The Custom Survey Bot is a way to get all the features of Subo, but with more personalization and customization options. You can choose your own app avatar, description, and name.

items.question: How do I create my own survey bot with Subo?
items.answer: Purchase the Custom Survey Bot option from our pricing page, create your own app in the Discord Developer Portal, then enter the app name and token in the Subo Web App settings. Your custom bot will be published automatically, no need to contact the team. For more details, check our tutorials.

items.question: How much does the Custom Survey Bot cost?
items.answer: The Custom Survey Bot costs $99.99 per year.

items.question: Are there monthly subscriptions available for the Custom Survey Bot?
items.answer: No, because setting up a Custom Bot requires some custom set up by the development team, we only accept yearly subscriptions for the Custom Survey Bot.

items.question: Is a Free Trial available for the Custom Survey Bot?
items.answer: No, because setting up a Custom Bot requires some custom set up work by the development team, we only accept yearly subscriptions for the Custom Survey Bot. If you want to try the bot, start with the other versions of Subo to get familiar with the experience, then upgrade to the Custom Bot when you are ready to change the branding.

items.question: Do I need to know how to code to create my own app?
items.answer: No. The app creation on the Discord Developer portal is very simple. You will just need to fill a few fields and upload an image.

ctaSection.title: CREATE YOUR OWN SURVEY BOT
ctaSection.description: Join the ranks of servers with their own custom-branded survey bots. Get all the power of Subo with your unique identity.

pollsPage.pageTitle: Discord Poll Bot: Quizzes, Prediction Contests & Scoring | Subo
pollsPage.pageDescription: Subo turns Discord polls into auto-graded quizzes and prediction contests. Score each option, mark correct answers, reward XP and roles, and customize every invitation.

hero.title: Discord polls that score, grade, and reward
hero.subtitle: Discord has native polls, but they only count votes. Subo polls run trivia nights and prediction contests, then reward your members automatically.

sections.label: CONTROL
sections.title: More than a quick vote
sections.sub: Native Discord polls are fine for a snap vote. Subo gives you the controls a real community decision needs.

cards.title: Choose who can vote
cards.desc: Restrict to specific roles, your whole server, or open it to anyone with the link.

cards.title: Schedule open & close
cards.desc: Set when a poll starts and ends, and Subo opens and closes it for you automatically.

cards.title: Decide how results show
cards.desc: Live or hidden until close, anonymous or identified: you set the level of transparency.

cards.title: Export the data
cards.desc: Download every vote as CSV or Google Sheets. Because responses are tied to each member, you can connect the dots over time.

sections.label: SCORE
sections.title: Turn any poll into a quiz or contest
sections.sub: Give your options points, mark the right answer, and let Subo do the grading: no spreadsheet, no manual tally.

cards.title: Correct answers
cards.desc: Mark the right option and Subo shows a ✓ once the poll closes: in the poll, in /results, and on the result cards.

cards.title: Per-option scoring
cards.desc: Give each option its own point value and pipe a voter's points into the follow-up message with [score].

cards.title: Trivia, made effortless
cards.desc: Run a knowledge check or trivia night and watch the leaderboard sort itself out, automatically scored every time.

cards.title: Prediction contests
cards.desc: Let members call the outcome of the next match, a release date, or who lifts the World Cup, then award the points once the results are in.

sections.label: REWARD
sections.title: Polls that actually do something
sections.sub: Every vote is a member choosing to take part. Recognize them for showing up, and go further by tailoring rewards to how they answered.

cards.title: Reward everyone who votes
cards.desc: Give the same XP, role, or badge to anyone who takes part. Participation is engagement, and a little recognition brings members back.

cards.title: Or reward by performance
cards.desc: Want to go further? Award dynamic XP based on the score or correct answer, straight from the dashboard, the edit menu, or the /poll command.

cards.title: Roles & badges by answer
cards.desc: Grant a server role or badge based on how someone voted, perfect for a welcome-channel poll that sorts new members on the spot.

sections.label: CUSTOMIZE
sections.title: An invitation worth answering
sections.sub: The poll people see is the poll people answer. Make it unmistakably yours.

cards.title: Image & thumbnail
cards.desc: Add a banner image and a thumbnail so the invitation looks like your community, not a generic form.

cards.title: Call to action & footer
cards.desc: Write your own call-to-action message and footer text for every invitation.

cards.title: Custom chart emoji
cards.desc: Choose the emoji that fills the result bars, so even the chart matches your style.

cards.title: Embed border colors
cards.desc: Set the color of the embed border, with a separate one for when the poll is open versus closed, so a finished poll looks visibly different.

cards.title: Info in the embed or a popup
cards.desc: Choose what details to show, and whether to keep them visible in the embed or tuck them behind an info button that opens an ephemeral popup.

cards.title: Set defaults once
cards.desc: Define your polls' voice (call-to-action, footer, vote acknowledgements) at the server level, and every new project inherits it by default.

outro.title: 🧠 Build a clearer picture over time
body: When you want to learn more about your community, one strategy is a survey convo with several questions. Another is to run quick polls regularly.

With Subo, every response is tied to the member who gave it (unless anonymous mode is on), so you can connect the dots over time: see how opinions evolve, follow up, and understand individual preferences, not just the overall tally.
Discord's native polls can't do that.

featuresPage.pageTitle: Subo Features: Build, Collect, Analyze, Engage
featuresPage.pageDescription: Everything Subo can do for your Discord community: conversational surveys, AI drafting, role targeting, XP rewards, and more.

hero.title: EVERYTHING YOU NEED TO UNDERSTAND YOUR COMMUNITY
hero.subtitle: Subo brings professional-grade surveying to Discord, built for how communities actually work.

sections.label: BUILD
sections.title: Create surveys that feel like conversations
sections.sub: From a quick slash command to a fully branched questionnaire. Subo meets you where you are.

cards.title: Conversational format
cards.desc: Questions appear one at a time, like a chat, not a form wall. Higher completion, less friction.

cards.title: AI-assisted drafting
cards.desc: Use /draft to describe your goal in plain English. Subo generates a full multi-question survey instantly.

cards.title: Web admin builder
cards.desc: Design, preview, and manage surveys from the Subo web dashboard, no Discord commands needed.

cards.title: Skip logic & branching
cards.desc: Route respondents to different questions based on earlier answers. Simple logic on all plans; advanced syntax on VIP+.

cards.title: 4 question types
cards.desc: Open Text, Numeric, Single Choice (yes/no included), Multiple Choice, covering every feedback scenario.

cards.title: Content blocks
cards.desc: Add a message anywhere in your survey without asking a question: a welcome intro, a GIF, a warning to acknowledge, or a mid-survey pause. Respondents continue after a timer or by clicking a button.

cards.title: Custom Discord emojis
cards.desc: Use your server's custom emojis in questions, answer options, and responses, even when respondents take the survey on the web.

screenshot.alt: The Subo web admin showing a multi-question survey being built, with skip logic configured between questions.
screenshot.caption: The Subo web admin showing a multi-question survey being built, with skip logic configured between questions.

blogLink.text: Learn how to create your first survey →

sections.label: COLLECT
sections.title: Meet your members where they already are
sections.sub: Subo delivers surveys inside Discord, no link-out forms, no friction, no drop-off.

cards.title: Discord-native delivery
cards.desc: Subo posts a survey invite directly in your Discord channel. Members click and respond privately, no DMs required.

cards.title: Discord or web
cards.desc: Admins choose: let members respond in Discord, or open a web link for non-server visitors.

cards.title: Role targeting
cards.desc: Invite specific member segments by Discord role. Survey your paying customers, your moderators, your lurkers, separately.

cards.title: Three anonymity modes
cards.desc: Identified, More Anonymous, or Fully Anonymous: you set the level of trust per survey.

cards.title: Community-only or open
cards.desc: Restrict to your server members, or open the survey to anyone with the link.

cards.title: Scheduled open/close dates
cards.desc: Set a start date and deadline for your survey, and Subo opens and closes it automatically.

screenshot.alt: A Subo survey invite appearing in a Discord channel. Members click Take Survey and respond privately, in Discord or on the web.
screenshot.caption: A Subo survey invite appearing in a Discord channel. Members click "Take Survey" and respond privately, in Discord or on the web.

sections.label: ANALYZE
sections.title: Turn hundreds of responses into clear decisions
sections.sub: From live result charts to AI-synthesized summaries, your data does the heavy lifting.

cards.title: Live results dashboard
cards.desc: See aggregated responses as they come in: charts for closed questions, response lists for open text.

cards.title: AI-powered open text summaries
cards.desc: Subo reads every open-text response and generates a concise synthesis. Get the gist of 500 answers in seconds.

cards.title: CSV export
cards.desc: Download all responses for deeper analysis in Excel, Google Sheets, or your own tooling.

cards.title: Skip logic means better data
cards.desc: Every respondent only sees relevant questions. No "N/A" noise polluting your results.

cards.title: Share findings
cards.desc: Post a results summary directly back into Discord to close the feedback loop with your community.

screenshot.alt: The results dashboard for an open-text question, showing an AI-generated summary alongside individual responses.
screenshot.caption: The results dashboard for an open-text question, showing an AI-generated summary alongside individual responses.

blogLink.text: Build smarter surveys with skip logic →

sections.label: ENGAGE
sections.title: Make participation worth something
sections.sub: Reward members with XP, roles, and achievements, based on how they answer, not just whether they finish.

cards.title: XP rewards
cards.desc: Every completed project earns XP points. Available on all plans, even free.

cards.title: Monthly leaderboard
cards.desc: Premium+ servers get an automatic monthly XP leaderboard posted in Discord. Rank your most engaged members.

cards.title: Role rewards
cards.desc: Automatically grant or remove Discord roles based on survey completion or XP thresholds.

cards.title: Action blocks
cards.desc: Drop XP, role, or achievement rewards anywhere in the flow, fire mid-survey, conditionally on answers. Onboarding roles for new joiners, XP for quiz takers who got it right, beta access for the right candidates.

cards.title: Custom XP name
cards.desc: Rename XP to match your community's brand ("Stars", "Coins", "Rep") on Premium and above.

cards.title: Discord polls
cards.desc: Run quick single-question Discord polls alongside your deeper surveys. Native Discord UI, zero setup.

screenshot.alt: An XP leaderboard embed posted in Discord, showing the top 10 most engaged community members for the month.
screenshot.caption: An XP leaderboard embed posted in Discord, showing the top 10 most engaged community members for the month.

developerApi.title: BUILD AND AUTOMATE.
developerApi.subtitle: Automate surveys, pipe responses to your data stack, or let AI agents run your community research. All via a simple REST API.

features.title: AUTOMATE & COLLECT
content: Auto-generate survey scripts from a plain-text description using AI
Open, close, clone, and schedule projects via API

features.title: REWARD & ANALYZE
content: Retrieve respondent answers in real time
Manage member XP, access levels, achievement and community settings
Get aggregated stats, distributions, and AI-generated summaries

features.title: INTEGRATE & EXTEND
content: Subscribe to webhook events for real-time data pipelines
Pipe responses to your data stack, CRM, or analytics tools
Let AI agents run surveys and retrieve results autonomously
